# Empowerment Path Foundation (EPF)

> Empowerment Path Foundation is a Detroit-based nonprofit empowering single-parent families through trauma-informed support, life skills education, housing assistance, and economic empowerment. Founded by Tina N. Bowden-Hayes.

## About EPF

Empowerment Path Foundation (EPF) is a comprehensive support organization serving single-parent households in Detroit, Michigan. EPF addresses higher rates of poverty, housing instability, and limited access to coordinated support through evidence-based programming.

Founded by Tina N. Bowden-Hayes, EPF operates under the fiscal sponsorship of Bringing Back the Block, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization (EIN: 83-4245282).

## Programs & Services

- **Life Skills & Wellness:** Trauma-informed support and personal development
- **Entrepreneur Development:** Business skills and economic empowerment
- **Agriculture & Gardening:** Urban farming and food security initiatives
- **Resource Access Hub:** Coordinated support and community resources
- **The Duplex Initiative:** Housing stability and assistance programs
- **Technical Production Training:** Career training in lighting, audio, and production management—developed by board member Erica D. Hayes, one of the top lighting designers in the United States

## Leadership

- **Tina N. Bowden-Hayes** — Founder. Nonprofit program development and community advocacy specialist with over a decade of experience.
- **Emory Reeves** — President. Organizational development and community engagement leader.
- **Michelle Wheeler** — Vice President. Advocacy, resource coordination, and stakeholder engagement.
- **Erica D. Hayes** — Board Member & Strategic Advisor. One of the top lighting designers, lighting directors, and grandMA programmers in the United States. IATSE Local 728 member. Developed EPF's Technical Production Training program.

## Location

Detroit, Michigan, USA

## Mission

Empower parents, uplift families, and build brighter futures through trauma-informed programming, life skills education, and community-based mentorship designed to promote sustainable self-sufficiency.

## Contact

Website: https://empowermentpathfoundation.org

## Related Organizations

- [Bringing Back the Block](https://bringbacktheblock.org) — Fiscal sponsor (501(c)(3))
- [Erica D. Hayes](https://ericadhayes.com) — Board member, lighting designer
- [Crew Development Institute](https://cdi-global.org) — Technical training nonprofit also founded by Erica D. Hayes
